column1:
Access Bank Plc recently acquired Finibanco Bank in Angola on the 30th of June 2023 as agreed between both parties. The bank however obtained control of the entity on 5th September 2023 by virtue of its ability to meet the
control requirement of ownership of up to 66% as stipulated in the agreement. The acquisition involved the Bank acquiring 99.2% of the issued share capital of Finibanco in exchange for cash of N31,546,835,859 used to pay off
the shareholders of former Finibanco.
The goodwill has been computed by comparing the fair value of the net asset of former Finibanco to the cash consideration paid for the acquisition.
Consideration payable at a future date
Net assets/ (liabilities) acquired from business combination (see note 44 2 4,849
